lines.speaker: Zandar Horfyre
lines.text: My name is Zandar Horfyre, and you [player name] are trespassing in my tower, not to mention attacking my students! I thank you to leave immediately!

lines.speaker: Zandar Horfyre
lines.text: Good! And don't forget to close the door behind you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I think I'll stay for a bit.

lines.speaker: Zandar Horfyre
lines.text: Actually, that wasn't an invitation. I've tried being polite, now we'll do it the hard way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I guess he already has!
